Arsenal: 🏅 The Invincibles: Unbeaten all season (38 games)
⚽ Thierry Henry scored 30 goals in the league
🎖️ First English team to win league unbeaten
🛡️ Record 2,295 minutes without conceding at home

Manchester United: 👑 Won Premier League and Champions League Double
⚽ Cristiano Ronaldo: 42 goals in all competitions
🥅 Premier League title by 2 points ahead of Chelsea
🏆 Sir Alex Ferguson's third Champions League title
Chelsea: ⚽ Frank Lampard and Didier Drogba partnership at peak

Manchester City: 🎯 Premier League title by 1 goal on final day
⚽ Sergio Agüero: 35-yard goal in final minute of final match
📈 Second highest points total ever (89 points)
🔥 Won 5 consecutive league titles start to finish
Manchester United: 🥈 Second place but 8 points clear of third
🛡️ Strongest defensive record of the season

Manchester City: ⚽ 106 goals scored - most in a single season
🎯 Won title by 19 points - largest margin ever

Liverpool: 👑 First Premier League title in 30 years
⚽ Mohamed Salah and Sadio Mané partnership peak

Manchester City: ⚽ Erling Haaland: 36 goals - broke Premier League record
📊 Most goals scored in Premier League history (117)
🎯 Won by 5 points from Arsenal (who also broke records)
Arsenal: 🚀 Second place with 84 points - second best in history
📊 Only 2 points fewer than 2017-18 City but finished 2nd

Manchester City: 🏆 Premier League + FA Cup + League Cup + Champions League treble potential
Arsenal: 📈 Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli matured into stars
🎯 One of strongest runner-up campaigns ever
